name: AWS IAM New SSH Public Key Uploaded For A User
description: A new SSH public key uploaded for an IAM user means that a new authentication method has been enabled, providing secure access to AWS resources. This action could be part of regular administrative tasks like key rotation or provisioning but requires monitoring to ensure it's part of a legitimate process.

rules.name: AWS IAM SSH Public Key Updated for a User

author: Sunil Bharti & David Agni
